hero.title_tag: Oflem — What if you didn't have to do it all alone?
hero.description: Dog walking, furniture assembly, gardening, administrative help, large projects or small daily emergencies, post your need for free. Serious and verified people near you will answer. Payment
examples: Ex: Urgent errands, walk my dog, assemble a piece of furniture...
Help for my Vaud tax return
Go to the recycling center with my bulky items
Translation of a German contract to French
Need 2 people for a move in Geneva

categories_section.label: What people can post on Oflem
categories_section.title: You might recognize yourself here.
categories_section.subtitle: This isn't a fixed list. Oflem isn't a platform specialized in a single service type, but a space where you freely describe your need.

pets.title: Walking & Pets
pets.sub: Your dog needs to go out. You, not necessarily.

bricolage.title: Assembly & Handyman
bricolage.sub: That flat-pack furniture that's been waiting too long.

cleaning.title: Cleaning & Maintenance
cleaning.sub: Because coming home to a clean space changes everything.

gardening.title: Gardening & Outdoor
gardening.sub: Tall grass, leaves everywhere, a little refresh.

daily.title: Daily Help
daily.sub: Pick up a parcel, run an errand, go to the recycling center.

admin.title: Administrative Help
admin.sub: Taxes, official letters, Swiss procedures: a human who understands your situation.

remote.title: Remote Missions
remote.sub: Translations, documents, organization, writing. Everything is done from home.

other.title: Something else?
other.sub: If it's legal and simplifies your life, post it.

step1.title: Describe what you need
step1.desc: One sentence is enough. "Help for my Vaud tax return" or "Someone to assemble a wardrobe Saturday morning in Montreux". Indicate your budget. Posting is free and without commitment.

step2.title: Verified providers answer you
step2.desc: People near you, verified by Oflem, consult your request and make a proposal. You compare, you choose, without pressure.

step3.title: You only pay when everything is finished
step3.desc: The amount is held safely. The provider is paid only after your validation. In case of trouble, our team intervenes.

map.caption_sub: Oflem scans providers around you and presents you the best offers.

pillars_section.label: Why Oflem
pillars_section.title: A clear framework for your services
pillars_section.description: Transparency, security, and simple rules — for both clients and providers.

transparency.title: Total transparency
transparency.text: The price displayed is the final price. No hidden fees. No surprises. That's the rule.

escrow.title: Escrow payment
escrow.text: The money is held until the mission is completed. You validate, then it's released. Not before.

profiles.title: Verified profiles
profiles.text: Identity confirmed. Visible reviews. Searchable history. You know who you are trusting.

pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.title: A simple commission, shown before payment
pricing.description: Posting is free. No subscription. A commission is added to the provider's price plus the Oflem commission, visible before confirming.

providers.title: For providers
providers.text: The provider receives 100% of what they proposed. The commission is on the client side: their compensation is net, from the start.

purpose.title: What it's for
purpose.text: Provider verification, escrow payment protection, support in case of dispute. Not a simple ad wall.

audience.label: For who
audience.title: Oflem is for everyone.
audience.subtitle: And we say it with a straight face.

client.title: A helping hand. Without complications.
client.description: There are days when delegating isn't a luxury, but simply practical. Whether it's a small service or a real helping hand, you're helped by someone reliable, near you.

provider.title: Your talent deserves to be paid.
provider.description: You have know-how, a skill, or simply time. Around you, people are looking for exactly what you know how to do, every day as well as for larger projects.
bullets: You receive 100% of your offer amount
Your personal Oflem page to share

remote_missions.label: Remote Missions
remote_missions.title: Some things don't need travel.
remote_missions.description: Tax returns, document translation, help understanding official letters, proofreading a file, professional layout. These missions are done entirely online.
examples: Help for my Vaud tax return, independent regime
Translation of a German contract to French
Revision of my CV for a position in German-speaking Switzerland

client.title: You have a remote need
client.description: Describe your request freely. A qualified provider works from home and delivers the result. Protected payment, as for any Oflem mission.

provider.title: You offer your skills remotely
provider.description: Remote-only providers go through a streamlined identity check. In return, they only access remote missions. For any direct contact with a client, complete verification is mandatory.

bullets.text: Missions from home, at your pace
100% of your offer comes back to you
Limited access to remote missions only

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before starting.
faq.label: FAQ

escrow.a: Imagine you entrust your money to a trusted referee. He keeps it safe until the work is done and you're happy. If everything goes well, he gives it to the provider. If something goes wrong, he waits until a solution is found. Simple.

cost_client.q: How much does it cost for a client?
cost_client.a:
Posting a request is free. When you accept an offer, you pay the amount proposed by the provider, plus the Oflem commission, clearly displayed before validation. No hidden fees, no small print.

The commission is degressive: 25% up to CHF 149 · 20% between CHF 150 and 499 · 12% from CHF 500. It covers provider verification, protection of your payment by escrow, and our support if something goes wrong. Clearly: you don't just pay for a connection, you pay for a secure framework.

any_mission.a: Absolutely. Dog walking, parcel pickup, furniture assembly, tax returns. Anything that is legal and simplifies your life can be published. Oflem is not reserved for major works.

verification.a: For field providers, we check ID piece, the right to work in Switzerland, and qualifications if the mission requires it. For remote providers, no documents are required: a verified email and a complete profile are enough.

unsatisfied.q: What if I am not satisfied?
unsatisfied.a: You don't have to validate the mission if the work does not comply. Funds remain blocked until the dispute is resolved. Our mediation team intervenes within 24 business hours.

payment.a: The client blocks the amount in escrow before you start. Once the mission is validated, you receive 100% of your offer within 2 to 3 business days. The Oflem commission is added to the price on the client side. It never decreases what you receive.

cost_provider.q: How much does it cost for a provider?
cost_provider.a:
Registration is free. No subscription, no fixed fees. You propose a price, you receive 100% of that amount. Period.

The Oflem commission (25% · 20% · 12% depending on the mission) is added on the client side, never deducted from your gain. This is what attracts serious clients, with a guaranteed payment even before you start.

artisan.q: Do I have to be a professional or self-employed?
artisan.a: No. Oflem is open to professionals, self-employed, students, and motivated individuals. For small daily missions, no specific qualification is required. For technical work, we verify your qualifications.

freedom.q: Do I choose my missions freely?
freedom.a: Yes. You consult requests around you and respond only to those that interest you. No volume obligation, no penalty if you don't apply. You work when you want, how you want.

dispute.q: What happens in case of a dispute with a client?
dispute.a: Our mediation team intervenes within 24 business hours. Funds remain blocked in escrow during resolution. If you have realized the work in accordance with what was requested, you are protected.

regions.q: In which regions are you available?
regions.a: French-speaking Switzerland: Geneva, Vaud, Fribourg, Neuchâtel, Valais and Jura. Extension to German-speaking Switzerland planned soon.

legal.q: What is the legal relationship between the parties?
legal.a: Oflem is a matching intermediary (broker within the meaning of Art. 412 CO). No subordinate relationship exists between the client and the provider. The provider operates as self-employed or as a company.

commission_why.q: What is the commission for specifically?
commission_why.a:
It funds three precise things.

1. Provider verification: ID piece and right to work for field providers, profile and email for remote providers. Even before your first request, the sorting is done.

2. Payment protection: your money is placed in escrow and released only once the mission is finished and validated by you.

3. Support in case of problem: if something goes wrong, the funds remain blocked and our team intervenes to find a solution.

Without commission, Oflem would be a simple ad. With it, it's a framework.

commission_high.q: Is 25% a lot for a small mission?
commission_high.a: On a CHF 40 mission, it represents CHF 10. In exchange, you have: a verified provider, a protected payment, and a team available if things go wrong. Even for a dog walk or an urgent errand, you entrust something — your time, your animal, your keys. This framework has a cost, and it is the same regardless of the mission size.

cta.skill:
And if you have a skill, a talent, or simply the desire to help:
someone near you needs it.

guarantees.title: What Oflem guarantees
guarantees.secure_payment_desc: Mission paid after realization, funds blocked on an escrow account.
guarantees.full_rewards_desc: Providers receive the full price agreed upon.
guarantees.swiss_quality_desc: A platform built by help-seekers for help-seekers.

footer.description: The Swiss platform to delegate, from express helping hand to qualified professional.
